html:
“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Grass Turf is one of the Turf items, acquired by digging Grassland tiles with a Pitchfork. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile, or used as fuel. Grass Turf can also be crafted and prototyped at Terra Firma Tamper with 1 Cut Grass and 1 Petals in the Decorations Filter.

Plants like Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, Saplings, Spiky Bushes, Lureplants, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts can be planted on these Turfs. It will not stop the Lureplants' Eyeplants from spawning.

When placed on the Surface World and the area is large enough, only Redbirds will spawn and land on these Turfs. During Winter Redbirds are replaced by Snowbirds.

Gallery

  • Wilson standing on placed Grass Turf.
  • Grass Turf as seen on the Map.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
TurfsCraftable Items

Plants like Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, Saplings, Spiky Bushes, Lureplants, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts can be planted on these Turfs. It will not stop the Lureplants' Eyeplants from spawning.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Grass Turf là ​​một trong những vật phẩm Turf, có được bằng cách đào các ô Grassland bằng Chĩa. Giống như các loại Đất khác, nó có thể được đặt trên bất kỳ nền đất trống nào hoặc dùng làm nhiên liệu. Cỏ Cỏ cũng có thể được chế tạo và tạo mẫu tại Terra Firma Tamper với 1 Cỏ Cắt và 1 Cánh Hoa trong Bộ Lọc Trang Trí.

'''Grass Turf''' is one of the [[Turf]] items, acquired by digging [[Grassland]] tiles with a [[Pitchfork]]. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile, or used as [[Fire#Fuel|fuel]]. Grass Turf can also be crafted and prototyped at [[Terra Firma Tamper]] with 1 [[Cut Grass]] and 1 [[Petals]] in the [[Decorations Filter]].

Plants like [[Berry Bush]]es, [[Grass Tuft]]s, [[Saplings]], [[Spiky Bush]]es, [[Lureplant]]s, [[Pine Cone]]s, and [[Birchnut]]s can be planted on these Turfs. It will not stop the Lureplants' [[Eyeplant]]s from spawning.

When placed on the [[Surface World]] and the area is large enough, only [[Redbirds]] will spawn and land on these Turfs. During [[Winter]] Redbirds are replaced by Snowbirds.
